_comment: Copy to ~/.tvbox/firetv_tv_codes.json and edit. This preset targets an LG TV (NEC protocol, address 0x04) - the addresses/commands below are the standard LG TV IR codes and should work on most LG sets (incl. 2019 models). For a non-LG TV, replace each entry with your TV's code: use {"nec":{"address":N,"command":M}} for NEC TVs, or {"pronto":"0000 006D ..."} for a Pronto/CCF code from an IR database, or {"raw":[..],"frequency":38000} for raw on/off durations in units of 10 microseconds.
name: LG TV (NEC, address 0x04)
